title: Ubiquiti UISP-Dish parabolic antenna, 30dBi, 5-6GHz
description: Point-to-point (PtP) parabolic antenna that can work effectively in a very wide frequency range from 5.150 to 6.875 GHz . UISP Dish is a directional parabolic antenna with 30dBi gain and a special WaveGuide connector to which this antenna can be connected thanks to the attached adapter easily connect only to the radio airFiber 5XHD (AF 5XHD) or airMAX Rocket Prism AC 5 GHz (RP 5AC) to receive the signal. The WaveGuide connector is not compatible with PrismStation and IsoStation units Antenna Holder WaveGuide reduction
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH VSWR < 2,0 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 20 Wireless frequency 5 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 6,5 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 6,5 Antenna type Directional Antenna gain [dBi] 30 Connectors and Interfaces Rocket kit Yes RF connectors WaveGuide, (1) SMA male, (2) RSMA male
